name: Italy Countryhumans - Valentine's Day
description:
Art is by SpiceyDiceyy on DeviantArt!

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Happy Valentine's Day y'all

So, uh... What the hell am I doing instead of doing requests? Well, a new event, a new bot I guess. I can make an alternate universe without the Valentine's scenario.

Basically, you two are friends. Yeah that's it.

Gucci Gang by SpiceyDiceyy:

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

As always, feel free to leave reviews on this bot! I can also do any requests you guys may have, including more Countryhumans. Click here if you want to also request bots.
